title: Researchers name 98-million year old wasp species after Oscar Piastri
summary:
Three biologists have named a newly-discovered wasp species after McLaren F1 driver Oscar Piastrii.
Corentin Jouault, Di-Ying Huang and Celso O. Azevedo conducted research on a 98-year-old fossil from the Cretaceous Period, discovered in Myanmar, which gave them insight into the species' evolution and morphological similarities to other wasp species.
The ancient wasp is encased in a ...Keep reading

title: Inside Le Mans' groundbreaking new Motorsport Museum
summary:
The Motorsport Museum has opened its doors in Le Mans following a colossal construction project completed within an astonishingly short time frame.
For just under a year, the former Le Mans 24 Hours Museum was closed. During this time, walls were moved, 45,000m³ of earth was displaced, exhibits were reimagined and a rare collection was brought together.

title: Inside Opel’s ambitious project to build a Formula E winner
summary:
Opel is back on the world motorsport stage, and its bold Formula E project is built to do more than compete; it’s here to win.

Opel is entering a bold new era in electric motorsport with the Opel GSE Formula E Team, joining the FIA Formula E World Championship for the upcoming Gen4 era.

In this exclusive RacingNews365 interview, Opel team principal Jörg Schrott and test & development driver Sophia Flörsch discuss why now is the right moment for Opel to join Formula E, how the team is preparing behind the scenes, and what fans can expect from the powerful new Opel GSE Formula E project.
